yourCommunities.subtitle: A member-scoped feed shell. Keep it tight on mobile and let the sidebar carry the heavier navigation.
yourCommunities.title: Your Communities

post.commentsBody: Thread replies are not scaffolded yet. This route exists to pin the URL contract and page chrome for `post_id` reads.
post.description: Single-thread route shell for the future `GET /posts/{post_id}` read.

onboarding.description: Single onboarding route with client-managed phases. No nested onboarding URLs are locked yet.
onboarding.title: Finish setting up your Pirate identity

inbox.body: Keep `/inbox` as a neutral placeholder until notifications or messaging are specified as real product surfaces.
inbox.description: This route is scaffolded so the mobile nav can point somewhere truthful while inbox behavior is still undefined.
inbox.title: Inbox placeholder

createCommunity.description: Scaffolded shell around the existing community composer composition. Submission is not wired yet.
createCommunity.title: Create a community

notFound.body: The first scaffold only locks a small set of routes: home, feeds, communities, posts, profiles, onboarding, inbox placeholder, and community create.
notFound.title: Route not found
